entry.title: Re: Showing the Currency type and rates in a SAC Story
entry.content: Thank you @JefB - looks risky indeed 🙂 I'll do it in a simpler way 🙂

entry.title: Re: Adding a new field in v2 oDataModel binded to a sap.u...
entry.content:
Hi Sebastiano.
Thanks for your reply. We are using CAPM NodeJs for oData services. But the CUSTOMER_HIER_LIST is actually an external service from another deployed CAPM app. So I was wondering if we can use the above cds code in srv folder's cds file. We have the following definition currently.

 

using {  DealService as DS } from '../srv/external/DealService'; 

service camps @(requires: 'authenticated-user') {

entity CUSTOMER_HIER_LIST as projection on DS.CUSTOMER_HIER_LIST ;

 // ... Other service definitions
}

entry.title: Re: Attach new WBS Element to the Project definition using BAPI's in reports
entry.content:
Hi Vineetha,

How can we achieve this if we have to include the new WBS element by referring to the standard WBS element using BAPI / FM?

 

Thanks,

Nikesh

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing components and pricing
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am trying to find information regarding licensing / pricing of SAP Digital Manufacturing. The product does not appear on Cloud Discovery Center and it is hard to find information. Maybe someone here will be able to help.

These are my initial questions:
1) Where can I find information about the pricing? Any L2 deck or similar available for public?
2) What is the base price and metric for DM? Is there a calculator?
3) Are Users part of the metric? If so, how are they counted?
4) SAP DM is using integration suite for integration with on-premise ERP Systems. Is the integration suite included with the price? My last information was no, but the few slides that I found indicate otherwise? I am aware that messages on integration suite are not counted due to SAP to SAP if the standard content is being used, but what about the subscription cost of integration suite?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Searching work orders
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I'm trying to search for all the work orders under a level 1 or level 2 FLOC structure. I want to see all the WOs on all equipment under these levels. 

I have tried searching via IW39 filtering eg. level 1 FLOC but it's only showing a handful of error WOs tied to that level 1 FLOC and no other WO on equipment under it. 

Any ideas?

entry.title: CAP Node Js Authorization: Unable to retrieve User logged scopes
entry.content:
He expert,

My Project setup as TypeScript

with packge: 

 "@sap/cds": "^8.1.1",
        "@sap/cds-compiler": "^5.1.0",
        "@sap/cds-dk": "^8.1.1",
  "@sap/xsenv": "^5.2.0",
        "@sap/xssec": "^4.2.1",
CDS Auth
"cds": {
        "requires": {
            "auth": {
                "kind": "xsuaa"
            },
            "db": {
                "kind": "hana",
                "model": "srv",
                "pool": {
                    "pingCheck": false,
                    "acquireTimeoutMillis": 5000,
                    "min": 100,
                    "max": 1000,
                    "fifo": true
                }
            }
        },
 
-----------------------------
I'm trying to get scopes assigned to the user via jwt token
For role collections, it working well i can retrieved all role collections assigned to user via
xs.rolecollections
 
 But for the scopes, it's not return scopes of apps just only open id and apps namelike that:
["openid","myapp!t203402"] as far as i know it should
["openid","myapp!t203402.CreateScope","myapp!t203402.DeleteScope"] right?
See JWT decoded

 

I've tried with req['authInfo'], req['user'].scope but no luck
Can anyone tell me how can i get scopes of logged user?

entry.title: Global Information - Dependents
entry.content:
Hi!

I am trying to trigger a rule for the Global Information of the dependents so after I select a specific country the field will be auto populated with ,,No" at Hire/Rehire. I already tried oninit rule but if I just select the fields from Global Information, it changes them just for the employee, not for the dependent too. Then I tried onchange rule based on the relationship type but the rule is not triggered. Any other ideas?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How can I put empty in Request parameter in Business...
entry.content:
Hello @Daichi_W

Check if in the object modeler if this can be changed from visible to hidden or mandatory to optional.

Best Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: SAP Transportation Management and EDI Connections with Steamship Lines
entry.content:
Hello All,

We would like to leverage ocean schedule functionality in SAP TM and to integrate directly with a steamship line via EDI to send booking request, confirmations, milestones and invoices. Has anyone successfully been able to connect with a large SSL such as Maersk or MSC?

entry.title: 🟢 Understand the clean core extensibility options for Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Understand the difference between the different extensibility options available with ABAP Cloud for Cloud ERP and see how to use them. The focus of this session is on developer extensibility. ABAP Cloud is the comprehensive development model for building clean core compliant, cloud-ready business applications, services, and extensions on both SAP Business Technology Platform and SAP S/4HANA, in the cloud and on-premise.

Speakers : Carine Tchoutouo Djomo and André Fischer.

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing components and pricing
entry.content: Hi, SAP Digital Manufacturing pricing might be a good starting point to clarify some of your questions, but I highly recommend you get in touch with your local SAP Sales for further details. Br, Manoel

entry.title: SAP FSM Pop up survey - Deactivation
entry.content:
Hello experts (Support Services )

We are trying to automate some test scenarios in @fsm , and sometimes we come up with some pop up survey notifications, is it possible to have deactivated this pop at the account level, if so waht would be the procediment to do it?  and how frequent this pop up will be shown in the FSM web Apps or Mobile Apps?

Please check the screenshot attached.

Thanks you.

entry.title: How to calculate open quantity per schedule line in scheduling agreement in new report?
entry.content:
Hej!

Our developer is trying to find a way to calculate the open qty of a schedule line but seems not able to find any way to do it easily. Seems run-time calculation in VA32 is really complex. Does anyone know a good way to achieve this without copying all the std code from the transaction?

Thanks and regards,

Magnus Frankell

entry.title: Transport logs shows as error but its a false error
entry.content:
For one of our SAP system , if we import a transport with dependency errors initially it shows up with errors( which is expected ).

After we fix dependencies of the transport and reimport them, even though all the steps show no errors,  It seems log as as error again 

any ideas how to get rid of this false positive error in transport log?

As you can see below, transport was reimported at 13:14 ~ 13:21 and ended with warning but for some reason , its logging as error because the previous error we had.

entry.title: How to register Bing X with "XVHZFQ"
entry.content: English gives you access to the knowledge of the world

entry.title: Re: Limit the number of goals from populating in the perf...
entry.content:
It is possible to populate goals of certain categories, by adding the <obj-category> element and specifying the category ID to the XML form template. See the below KBA for further details

2543501 - How To Filter Goal Section by Category - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: SAP Products - Cloud Monitoring Status 24/7🌍, all year round!
entry.content: Are these status updates published as events by SAP? Is it possible to subscribe for these events?

entry.title: Problemas para visualizar autorizaciones en SAP Mobile
entry.content:
Estimados solicito de su ayuda hace unas semanas SAP Mobile ha dejado de actualizar las autorizaciones de   de venta solo me esta mostrando las del 2023 y no las actuales

Alguien me podría ayudar  , se renovó SSL y esta sin problemas .

gracias y me quedo atento a cualquier comentario.

entry.title: How to filter the execution of MD47 for a specific storage location?
entry.content: In the execution of MD47, under Issues and Available, is it possible to filter by a single storage location for analysis? If so, how can it be done or configured?

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )

entry.title: Re: How to bring HSN code ( Control code ) from purchase requisition to Purchase order
entry.content: i am facing the same issue. Did you find the solution for the same?

entry.title: Re: CAP Node Js Authorization: Unable to retrieve User logged scopes
entry.content:
hello,

I know it's crazy when i'm the owner of the question then i reply it but i can't close the question. So, just want to tell you guys my code is no issue the thing is i forgot re-login after assigning the role to my user (it's my bad)

So sorry to take your time reading this post 😞

I also found another way to get scope by using cds.context to share with you guys.

 const ctx = cds.context;
            if (ctx && ctx.user) {
console.log(ctx.user.scope
}

entry.title: Upcoming Webinar with Erie Insurance: Unlocking Potential: Leveraging Skills-Based Strategies
entry.content:
In today's dynamic business landscape, staying ahead means continually evolving your talent strategy. Join us for an insightful webinar where we reveal how innovative companies, like Erie Insurance, are leveraging skills-based approaches and cutting-edge solutions to shape the workforce of tomorrow.

Discover how Erie Insurance is transforming their talent management strategies through innovative solutions like Opportunity Marketplace, enabling them to uncover hidden potential, drive personal growth, and align individual development with strategic business goals.

We will explore:

  • How talent marketplaces are utilized to identify and cultivate emerging skills within the workforce
  • Strategies for aligning talent management with future business needs to bridge skill gaps and enhance organizational agility
  • The role of talent intelligence in supporting skills development and promoting internal mobility

Don’t miss this chance to learn from Erie Insurance’s success and gain actionable insights on how to future-proof your talent strategy.

Register Now

Our Speakers:

Kristina Lantz, Talent Management Consultant at Erie Insurance. She leads the design, development and implementation of solutions that support leadership development, onboarding of leaders and talent mobility. Kristina guides senior management through succession planning with the goal of identifying opportunities to grow potential successors. Kristina is leading efforts at Erie Insurance to make Opportunity Marketplace available to all employees, This is following successful pilots in various divisions of the company. She serves as a coach in Erie Insurance’s Coaching Network, that provide free career coaching to all employees. Kristina is certified in various personality assessments and utilizes that knowledge to help employees in the company leverage their strengths to meet their goals. She is a member of the Erie Women’s Fund and serves on the Grants Committee, supporting local organizations that help women and their families thrive in the community.

Dr. Lauren S. Park is currently a Senior HR Research Scientist on the SAP SuccessFactors Market Insights and Customer Engagement team. In partnership with SAP SuccessFactors clients, she leads applied mixed-method research programs on HR and workforce topics to inform SAP SuccessFactors product and portfolio strategy and provide consultative guidance to organizations around the world. Lauren is an active author and presenter on a variety of topics, including skills-based people practices; deskless workforces; learning and development; people management; and diversity, equity, and inclusion.

Lauren holds a dual-emphasis Ph.D. in Industrial-Organizational and Quantitative Psychologies from Portland State University, where her work focused on understanding and solving complex organizational challenges using advanced statistical techniques.

entry.title: Call for Speakers: SAP Inside Track Hyderabad 2024, Sep 21 2024
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce that SAP Inside Track Hyderabad 2024 is now open for speaker submissions! This premier event is a fantastic opportunity for SAP professionals, enthusiasts, and thought leaders to share their knowledge, insights, and innovations with a vibrant and engaged community. Whether you are an experienced speaker or a passionate newcomer, we invite you to contribute to this exciting event.

Event Overview

Date: Sep 21st 2024
Location: Hyderabad, India
Venue: SAP Callidus Cloud, 6th floor, Building No. 12-B, Raheja Mindspace IT Park (Google Maps)

SAP Inside Track Hyderabad is a community-driven event that brings together SAP users, developers, and experts from various industries. The event aims to foster learning, networking, and collaboration through a series of insightful sessions, workshops, and discussions.

Call for Speakers

We are looking for dynamic speakers to present on a variety of topics related to SAP technologies and solutions, we want to hear from you!

Topics of Interest

  1. Business AI Showcases & Use Cases
  2. SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)
  3. Embedded AI across Solutions - SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors & Other SAP Products
  4. SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors & Other SAP Products

Why Speak at SAP Inside Track Hyderabad?

  • Share Your Expertise: Showcase your knowledge and insights to a diverse and engaged audience.
  • Network with Peers: Connect with other SAP professionals, thought leaders, and industry experts.
  • Enhance Your Profile: Gain recognition and visibility within the SAP community.
  • Contribute to the Community: Play a part in the growth and development of the SAP ecosystem.

 How to register

To submit your proposal, please visit this link and complete the online submission form. If you have any questions or need further information, please contact us at sapcommunityhyderabad@gmail.com.

Next Steps: Once you submit your proposal,
Step 1: Our expert team will go through your proposal and if it is shortlisted, we will contact your for more details.
Step 2: This will again be discussed internally with the experts and once shortlisted, we will inform you about the next steps – like presentation format, social media advertisement etc.,

Stay Connected:

  • SAP Community Hyderabad Twitter
  • SAP Community Hyderabad LinkedIn 

We look forward to seeing you in Hyderabad!

 

Thanks & Regards,

Ruthvik

entry.title: SAP BI Connection to HIVE in Information Design Tool
entry.content:
Hi,

I created two relational connections via ODBC in IDT ver. 4.2 Support Pack 8 Patch 8 32 Bit. I created the first relational connection with the Generic ODBC datasource on the driver Cloudera ODBC Driver for Apache Hive ver. 2.07 32 Bit. I created the second relational connection with the Hive in CDH 6.1 on the driver SAP Hive ODBC Driver ver. 2.06 32 Bit. For both created relational connections, the connection test is valid. I have access to Hive. I can see all available Hive databases but I can't access tables. I can't display the values ​​of the Hive database.

I am asking for help in solving the described problem.

Thank you.

Bernadetta

entry.title: Re: How to apply AR to AP for the same client? Please adv...
entry.content: check this out: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/when-a-customer-is-also-a-vendor/ba-p/13394637

entry.title: Re: BOP not able to confirm
entry.content: Most likely due to resmod setting (check TA OVZJ) and check note 2589424 -> question 28.

entry.title: Re: Issues with an INT64 parameter in a Com UFL..
entry.content: Thank you for that response. A long long in C++ is 64 bits regardless of whether the application is compiled 32 bit or 64 bit. Nonetheless I did try this with CR2020SP4 with the same results: If a have a function in the UFL with a 64 bit param CR2020 will fail to load the UFL. Very repeatable.

entry.title: Re: Tax handling in SAP Retention functionality
entry.content: Did you ever get a solution for the taxes as described by yourself here? We have the same requirement we have custom code for it now but would like to use std functionality if possible

entry.title: Re: Issues with an INT64 parameter in a Com UFL..
entry.content: I meant to keep typing but the single line box for reply is difficult for me. Ido's SQL Expression is a great idea, but CR2016 and CR2020 insist on loading the entire table I want to use this on everytime I open the report or modify the SQL Expression. My table has millions of rows. It takes forever and for what purpose? Is there any way to disable that?

entry.title: Use Calculated Measure and Calculated Dimension in Report Management
entry.content:
Experts, 

Have any of you used the Calculated measure and Calculated dimensions? Any example? We have been trying that but there's no documentation and we haven't got any results. 

If anyone has an example I would appreciate.

entry.title: How to apply metadata patch in SAP Service and Asset Manager
entry.content:
In this How to guide, I will take you through the steps required to Apply patches in SAP Service and Asset Manager metadata definitions.

Contents:
What is a patch?
Why the fix is provided as a patch?
How to apply the patch?
Appendix

What is a patch?

            A patch is a compact representation of the differences between two files, intended for use with line-oriented text files. It describes how to turn one file into another, and is asymmetric: the patch from file1 to file2 is not the same as the patch for the other direction.

Why the fix is provided as a patch?

            Earlier, the fixes were provided as files including the change(s). The user has to replace the original standard file(s) with patch file(s) to get the fix.

It was a challenging and manual activity when 2 separate fixes required changes in the same file. To address this, a patch format was introduced for metadata fixes. The patch format uses context and line numbers to locate differing file regions. It can be applied to a somewhat earlier or later version of the first file than the one from which it was derived, as long as the applying program can still locate the context of the change.

A single patch file can contain the differences for any number of files, and git diff produces diffs for all altered files in the repository in a single patch.

How to apply the patch?

Patch can be applied in below IDE

  1. Offline - Microsoft Visual Studio Code
  2. Online - SAP Business Application Studio

Option 1: Offline - Microsoft Visual Studio Code

  1. Download metadata patch file from SAP Note XXXXXXX.
  2. Copy patch file in Microsoft Visual Studio Code.
  3. Apply patch to SAP Service and Asset Manager metadata.

Let’s use example of SAP Note 3486946 for 2405 metadata.

1 a) Download metadata patch file from SAP Note 3486946.

Download 3486946(2405).patch file from https://me.sap.com/notes/3486946

1 b) Copy patch file in Microsoft Visual Studio Code.

            Copy the downloaded file preferably adjacent to metadata definitions folder

1 c) Apply patch to SAP Service and Asset Manager metadata.

            Open embedded terminal in Microsoft visual studio code(Menu>Terminal>New Terminal), navigate to metadata definitions folder and run patch command.

 

patch --no-backup-if-mismatch -p4 < ../3486946\(2405\).patch

 

The --no-backup-if-mismatch option causes patch to not create backup files, even for mismatched patches

-p<n>

Remove <n> leading path components (separated by slashes) from traditional diff paths. Example with -p2, a patch against a/dir/file will be applied directly to file.

-p4 means, it is going to remove 4 leading path components 

From a/src/metadata/definitions/Application.app to Application.app

patching file Application.app indicates the changes has been applied successfully.

 

Option 2: Online - SAP Business Application Studio

  1. Download metadata patch file from SAP Note XXXXXXX.
  2. Copy patch file in SAP Business Application Studio.
  3. Apply patch to SAP Service and Asset Manager metadata.

2 a) Download metadata patch file from SAP Note 3486946.

Download 3486946(2405).patch file from https://me.sap.com/notes/3486946

2 b) Copy patch file in SAP Business Application Studio.

            Upload the downloaded patch file preferably into metadata definitions folder

2 c) Apply patch to SAP Service and Asset Manager metadata.

Open embedded terminal (Menu > View > Terminal)

Run patch command from metadata definitions folder

 

patch --no-backup-if-mismatch -p4 < ./3486946\(2405\).patch

 

patching file Application.app indicates the changes has been applied successfully.

Note: Delete 3486946(2405).patch file from the project structure after applying the patch.

 

Appendix:

Possible reasons for patch command failure

Common:
1. You have to be in the correct-level directory matching -p<n> option.
          -p<n> removes <n> leading path components (separated by slashes) from traditional diff paths. Example, with -p2, a patch against a/dir/file will be applied directly to file.
2. The file has to exist in your project structure that you’re trying to patch

3. Partially applied – If patch has been applied to 2 out of 3 files. Follow Point # 4, revert changes for first 2 files and then reapply.

Important:
4. The file has to be “sufficiently similar” to the one from which the patch was produced, otherwise the patch will fail to apply. - Make sure patch context is honoured. Apply patch on standard metadata. In case of customization, open the .patch in text editor and make changes manually. Refer “What is the structure of a patch” section.
5. Point #4 applies to all files in the .patch

Others:

  • Restart VSCode and try again
  • Open new workspace in VSCode and apply patch
  • Apply patch in SAP Business Application Studio

What is the structure of a patch?

Here is a simple patch from SAP Note 3486946 - SAP Service and Asset Manager - App update failed, NativeClass is not defined

3486946(2405).patch

 

diff --git a/src/metadata/definitions/Application.app b/src/metadata/definitions/Application.app
index 27681dc0d5..e7e901ddcc 100644
--- a/src/metadata/definitions/Application.app
+++ b/src/metadata/definitions/Application.app
@@ -22,5 +22,5 @@
     "OnSuspend": "/SAPAssetManager/Rules/ApplicationEvents/ResetPeriodicAutoSync.js",
     "OnExit": "/SAPAssetManager/Rules/ApplicationEvents/ExitEventHandler.js",
     "OnLinkDataReceived": "/SAPAssetManager/Rules/DeepLinks/LinkDataReceived.js",
-    "_SchemaVersion": "23.4"
+    "_SchemaVersion": "24.4"
 }

 

Breaking this into sections:

 

diff --git a/src/metadata/definitions/Application.app b/src/metadata/definitions/Application.app

 

This is the Git diff header. diff --git is not a literal command, but rather just suggests the notion of a Git-specific diff in Unix command style.

a/src/metadata/definitions/Application.app and b/src/metadata/definitions/Application.app are the files being compared, with added leading directory names a and b to distinguish them in case they are the same (as they are here, this patch shows the changes from one version to another of the same file). To generate this patch, I changed the file Application.app and ran git diff, which shows the un-staged changes between the working tree and the index. There are no directories named a and b in the repository, they are just conventions.

 

index 27681dc0d5..e7e901ddcc 100644

 

This is an extended header line, one of several possible forms, and only one in this patch. This line gives information from the Git index regarding this file: 27681dc0d5 and e7e901ddcc are the blob IDs of the A and B versions of the file contents being compared, and 100644 are the mode bits, indicating that this is a regular file: not executable and not a symbolic link (the use of .. here between the blob IDs is just as a separator and has nothing to do with its use in naming). Other header lines might indicate the old and new modes if that had changed, old and new filenames if the file was being renamed, etc.

The blob IDs are used if this patch is later applied by Git to the same project and there are conflicts while applying it. If those blobs are in the object database, then Git can use them to perform a three-way merge with those two versions and the working copy, to help you resolve the conflicts. The patch still makes sense to other tools besides Git; they will ignore this line.

 

--- a/src/metadata/definitions/Application.app
+++ b/src/metadata/definitions/Application.app

 

This is the traditional unified diff header, again showing the files being compared and the direction of the changes, which will be shown later: minus signs will show lines in the A version but missing from the B version; plus signs, lines missing in A but present in B. If the patch were of this file being added or deleted in its entirety, one of these would be /dev/null to signal that.

 

@@ -22,5 +22,5 @@
     "OnSuspend": "/SAPAssetManager/Rules/ApplicationEvents/ResetPeriodicAutoSync.js",
     "OnExit": "/SAPAssetManager/Rules/ApplicationEvents/ExitEventHandler.js",
     "OnLinkDataReceived": "/SAPAssetManager/Rules/DeepLinks/LinkDataReceived.js",
-    "_SchemaVersion": "23.4"
+    "_SchemaVersion": "24.4"
 }

 

This is a difference section, or hunk, of which there is just one in this diff. The line beginning with @@ indicates by line number and length the positions of this hunk in the A and B versions; here, the hunk starts at line 22 and extends for 5 lines in both versions. The subsequent lines beginning with a space are context: they appear as shown in both versions of the file. The lines beginning with minus plus signs have the meanings just mentioned above. This patch replaces a single line, fixing a schema version whereby the app update would fail mentioning NativeClass is not defined.

Patch Context:

entry.title: Re: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have a similiar question like @Antonis earlier. It would be very important for us to be able to expand the Team View option to more than just direct Reports. At the very least the should be an option to see the whole hierarchy below (similiar to what you can do in most other modules/reporting) as well as giving the option to also show matrix reports.

I checked the Roadmap Explorer but could not find anything related to that. Are there any plans to expand this view down the line?

Thank you very much in advance and best Wishes,

Salim

entry.title: Re: 能否针对客户的某一个销售范围设置销售退货订单和免费订单冻结？
entry.content:
您好，

这个是标准功能支持的，可以将冻结原因分配给不同销售订单类型。

请检查SSCUi  102391 “将冻结原因分配到销售凭证类型” ，即可解决您的问题，参见下图。

entry.title: SAP MaxDB Database Version Upgrade Steps
entry.content:
The below simple steps explains how to upgrade the SAP MaxDB database for the SAP system.

Recently we have upgraded the MaxDB version from 7.9.09 to 7.9.11

# Download new SAP MaxDB patches from Software Download Center (SWDC) -> Databases -> SAP MaxDB

# Stop the SAP system

# To check the current version of SAP MaxDB database - Login to database system and switch to <sid>adm or sqd<sid> (depend on your installation)

Issue below command:

sdbregview -l

The above command will display the present MaxDB version including below 3 locations -

1. Installation Global - /sapdb/programs(default path)
2. Installation Database - /sapdb/<sid>/db(default path)
3. Installation Client - /sapdb/clients/<sid>(default path)

Validate the version in all above 3 locations and note down the details.

# Login in dbmcli from OS level (Another way of validation)

Issue below command:

dbm_version

The above command will also display the DB version and installation root directory.

# To check how many databases are running on host (in case of multi DB installation)

db_enum

The above command will display all the MaxDB instances running on host including installation root directory with status(running/offline)

Upgrading the Instance and Global location

# Stop the database
Login to DB host and switch to sqd<sid> or <sid>adm
Login via dbmcli from OS level

Issue below command:

db_offline

Validate status post shutdown:

db_state

# Upgrade procedure
Login to DB host as user root.
Navigate the downloaded SAP MaxDB file and extract the media

Issue below command to update the database.

./SDBUPD –d <database_name> -u control,<password>
(This should be done via root user)

Issue below command to update the MaxDB client.

./SDBINST -i CL_<SID>
(This should be done via root user)

Issue below command to update the MaxDB Global Location.

./SDBINST -update_global
(This should be done via root user)

Choose <SID> - DB Installation

The above commands will update the MaxDB version in all 3 locations.

# Validation of new installed version
Switch to <sid>adm or sqd<sid> (depend on installation)

Issue below command -

sdbregview -l

MaxDB version should be consistent for all locations.

# Start SAP system

entry.title: Re: Everything you need to know about: SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
• Let's say I have a team of accountants.
  • Two in my team have a job profile of "Senior Accountant".
  • They share several required skill attributes.
  • One of them is REQUIRED to also be skilled in 'First Aid'.
  • When that person would leave, the new holder should inherit the requirement.

There used to be a way to assign competency requirements to a position: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/nageshpolu_sap-sapsuccess

This would be a good solution for these common team/workplace based requirements to have some people responsible for evac, fire hazard, safety, first aid - while it's not related to their job.

To give these responsibilities to a different person, all it takes is to manage the requirement on the position level.

Is that still possible with TIH and will these expected ratings be visible in the Growth Portfolio?

entry.title: Where can I start to learn how to configure, execute, and control shopfloor processes?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Configuring SAP Digital Manufacturing for Execution: Basic Data and Configuration learning journey.


Overview
This enablement aims business users, consultants, solution architects, and industry specialists, who want to configure, execute, and control shopfloor processes in the discrete manufacturing area using SAP Digital Manufacturing.

Learning objectives

  • Configure master data for discrete manufacturing.
  • Implement the production structure, mainly the Plant, Work Centers, Resource Types, and Resources.
  • Set up the master data, mainly the Operation Activities,  Routings, Materials, BOMs, Work Instructions, Data Collections, and Next Numbers.
  • Create and manage the floor stock.
  • Perform production, mainly create, release and process orders.
  • Control production through buyoffs and holds.
  • Manage nonconformances.
  • Create and edit PODs.
  • Manage User Certifications.

Prerequisites

  • Discovering SAP Digital Manufacturing
Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: PowerDesigner "edit selection" button unresponsive in...
entry.content:
Have you tried using "Edit Selection..." button in the context toolbar of the element? (see screenshot below) Have you tried removing the whole element, saving MMR, restarting PD and recreating that problematic element from scratch? Your problematic element seems suspiciout to me because it doesn`t have any object name in front of the "%" in the header "%(!DisplayName)". As you can see in my screenshot it says "Entity%(!DisplayName)"

HTH,

Ondrej Divis

entry.title: Re: Integrating Employee Central With Concur via Integration Center
entry.content:
Hello Rafael,

May I get a copy of your implementation guide also for SF EC to Concur using the 305 file?

Thank you!
Mary Katherine Johnson

marykatherine.johnson@terumobct.com

entry.title: Re: Alert for Open Sales Quotation Does not Appear When C...
entry.content:
Hi，

 

As a workaround, you can customize logic in sales order check badi.

The logic can be designed as below.

If the sales order is not refer to quotation.

Select if there is open quotation exist with the chosen material and customer.

if there is record selected, popup warning or error.

entry.title: Re: How to calculate open quantity per schedule line in s...
entry.content:
Ideally, open quantity should be considered from VBBE table.  Still if you want to check at schedule line level, consider the following fields from VBEP table

  • WMENG for Order quantity
  • DLVQTY_BU and
  • DLVQTY_SU for delivered quantities

but this report might give performance issue as SAP to check at schedule line level instead of item level.

entry.title: BOM for material 17 does not contain any valid itemsMessage No. CO636
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to create production order and don't want the system to look for the BOM, I need production without BOM.  But I'm getting this error while doing cost check in production order. 

BOM for material 17 does not contain any valid items

Message No. CO636

I've checked the setting in OPL8, the BOM explosion is blank (Do not read BOM).

 

Please advise.

 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: BYDFi referral Code: “dwPtzS”
entry.content: English is one of the most widely spoken languages in the world, and for good reason.

entry.title: Custom tax codes are not available in expense report.
entry.content:
Error: Newly created custom tax codes are not available in the Expense Report, Tax code field dropdown.

Only applicable for the Expense Reporting - Switzerland.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Custom tax codes are not available in expense report.
entry.content:
Initially the set up available in activities such as "Tax on Goods and Services" is only relevant for service processing, sales and purchasing transactions.

The settings for ERM (expense and reimbursement management) can be do in activities as "Expense Reporting - Switzerland". Nonetheless, the tax code group for expenses reports are delivered as standard by SAP and cannot be changed.

For region Switzerland, SAP delivered Tax codes should be sufficient for any domestic/export expense.

Please note that only SAP Deliver Tax codes will appear for Expense Report document type. The Tax codes - starts with 'Z' will not be available in Expense Report view.

You can check with your implementation partner if it would be possible to add custom tax codes for expense reports via custom add-on.

Also our recommendation is to post this as an enhancement idea over our Influence platform.

The same is monitored by our Product Management team, and posts are considered for next releases of the system.

You can access the Influence forum in the link below:

 https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/886

entry.title: Re: 供应商发票导入
entry.content: 你好， 在“导入供应商发票”的app中并不支持备选统驭科目的选择。 如果需要使用备选统驭科目，可以在配置完成备选统驭科目后，使用“创建进项发票” （FB60） 创建含备选统驭科目的供应商发票。

entry.title: Re: Getting msg 'Program names L... are reserved for function group includes'
entry.content:
The beginning of the suffix must begin with F, O, I, E, P or T99 and the format must be:
Lfunction-group-nameSxx
 - where "S" is the mentioned suffix letter.

You can also see the valid names in the master program comments, e.g.:

*******************************************************************
  INCLUDE lzdkd_const_class_generatortop.    " Global Data
  INCLUDE lzdkd_const_class_generatoruxx.    " Function Modules

*******************************************************************
*   User-defined Include-files (if necessary).                    *
*******************************************************************
* INCLUDE LZDKD_CONST_CLASS_GENERATORF...    " Subroutines
* INCLUDE LZDKD_CONST_CLASS_GENERATORO...    " PBO-Modules
* INCLUDE LZDKD_CONST_CLASS_GENERATORI...    " PAI-Modules
* INCLUDE LZDKD_CONST_CLASS_GENERATORE...    " Events
* INCLUDE LZDKD_CONST_CLASS_GENERATORP...    " Local class implement.
* INCLUDE LZDKD_CONST_CLASS_GENERATORT99.    " ABAP Unit tests

  INCLUDE lzdkd_const_class_generatorp01.
  INCLUDE lzdkd_const_class_generatorf01.
  INCLUDE lzdkd_const_class_generatoro01.
  INCLUDE lzdkd_const_class_generatori01.

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM: double entries in ERP list / no alerts
entry.content: Hi, Daniel,

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM: double entries in ERP list / no alerts
entry.content: Hi, Daniel, can you check KBA 3106170 - SAP Cloud ALM: Register error while adding private Cloud hosted ABAP systems (S/4HANA, Business Suite, SAP NetWeaver Application Server for ABAP systems) -> as this discusses the error you are reporting

entry.title: Re: Issues with an INT64 parameter in a Com UFL..
entry.content: Correct but internally CR 2016 will not handle 64 bit int's, it simply is not capable of dealing with it, as I said it can only handle 15 digits+sign. As for CR 2020 I'll ping the developer to have them look into 64bit int's, it could be u212 wasn't updated. For Ido's suggestion SQL Expressions will query the DB for every record returned. have a look at this KBA on using Expression: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2344277

entry.title: Re: Exporting contents
entry.content:
Hi, @nataliechen98 

If the goal is to export and import it later into another SAP Enable Now system or workarea, then just right-click the object or node in the Producer and select the Export entry in the context menu. The result will be a .dkp file.

If the goal is to export the content to play it outside of SAP Enable Now, then right-click the selected object or node, select Publish Selected Object entry, choose the format to export (Standard, Executable, Documents, SCORM, etc) and click OK.

entry.title: Variant Configuration - Object Dependencies - CEIL Function not Working
entry.content:
We are working on an Object Dependency with a VC BOM where we need the final result to round up to the nearest integer.  We see that the CEIL function should do exactly that but it is not working.  Our formula is as follows: 

$self.TC_BOM_QTY = CEIL ( MDATA $self.TC_BOM_QTY / TC_PC_PER_BOARD )

 We want to be the BOM Quantity to be equal to the BOM Quantity divided by the number of Pieces per Board.

For example: 

TC_BOM_QTY = 45

TC_PC_PER_BOARD = 18

45 / 18 = 2.5

We are expecting the CEIL function to set TC_BOM_QTY result to 3, but we are constantly receiving 2.5.  

We have even tried the FLOOR function to see if its just with CEIL, but we still get 2.5.  

Is there an issue with our Formula or Variables?   Do they need to be of a certain type for those functions (CEIL, FLOOR) to work?

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
Re: 使用Business Application Studio开发SAP Build Work Zone插件

At present manually to select user id from the list.

Best Regards,

Venkata

entry.title: Re: Failed to load destination. Caused by: No user token...
entry.content: thanks!! David,

entry.title: Re: Failed to load destination. Caused by: No user token...
entry.content:
thanks!! David, I was not setting auth token correctly.

const myFn = async (req, data) { cds.spawn( {  headers: req.headers.authorization, after: iafterTime }, async (req) => { await sendToSAP(req, customID) }) return 'processing in backgorund' }

entry.title: Re: Issues with an INT64 parameter in a Com UFL..
entry.content: Ok, that's good info re: CR2020, but perhaps you misunderstood my SQL Expression issues. Perhaps it should be its own topic. My SQL Expression is a SQL Function I want to apply to a column in a table. Of course it executes for every row returned when the report is previewed or run. But then, there is a where clause on sql statement. My issue is that loading the report in the designer performs a select <func>(table.column). That's the entire table. What possible purpose could that serve? For me, it makes this solution unusable. Is there any way to disable that?

entry.title: Serial Number Profile and Incompletion log
entry.content:
Hi dear community,

 

I have a question regarding Serial Number Profile & Incompleteness.

In TCODE OIS2 we define serial number profiles & assign procedures to those profiles. One of this procedures is "SDCC" "Completness check for delivery". If the Usage is set to 03 (obligatory) I would expect that we can setup a corresponding completeness check in SD / LE.

Now in TCODE OVA2 we can customize the incompleteness procedure. I would expect Table = V50UC, fieldname SERIAL to activate the incompleteness check.

Unfortunately my expectations do not match the system behaviour 😕  So I checked the incompleteness routine (SAPFV50U) v50uc_check_serial. This one only checks for SDLS and SDRE. It does not care about SDCC at all 😞 

 

Now my question: 

--> How is SDCC supposed to be working? I would like to enable / disable the check according to delivery type or similar.

--> What is the difference between SDCC and SDLS? in T377X I see the very same check routine "SERIAL_LISTE_LS". I also see the very same system behaviour. 

--> The requirement of my customer is to make the serial number entry obligatory only in case of dedicated (outbound) delivery (item) types. Is there some other way I am missing?

(The check in (SAPFV50U) v50uc_check_serial (via "SERIAL_LISTE_LS") is also executed during PGR. So I am even not able to deactivate the check for inbound deliveries.)

Thanks & lot in advance & Best,

entry.title: Re: Count function in webi
entry.content:
Check the documentation on the Count() function.

Have you tried using All?

Noel

entry.title: Re: sap gui for java connection error to a4h docker abap...
entry.content:
Hello,

The screenshot #1 shows a "rabax during SAP logon".

This means that the issue is happening at the SAP server.

You can set the parameter "login/quiet_mode = 0" (requires SAP to be restarted) to get more information on the dev_wXX trace files, which should then help to identify what is happening.

entry.title: Re: RFC Timeout Failure for PO Rejection from FIORI app - workflow
entry.content:
Hello,

Do you see a long running process (transaction SM50 or SM66) related to the rejection scenario?

Perhaps an ST12 trace could help clarify why the process is taking too long.

entry.title: Re: RFC Timeout Failure for PO Rejection from FIORI app -...

Hello,

Do you see a long running process (transaction SM50 or SM66) related to the rejection scenario?

Perhaps an ST12 trace could help clarify why the process is taking too long.

entry.title: numerical values ​​expressed in string raised to the power. Services Layer
entry.content:
In all queries made by the Service layer, the numerical fields are shown as numerical values ​​expressed in strings raised to the power. Attached Image 


thank you

appreciate your support for the help.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I hope this message finds you well. My name is Thien, a fresher student majoring in Software Engineering from Vietnam. I have been dedicated to self-learning and expanding my expertise in SAP ABAP development over the past year.

As someone passionate about technology and its ability to transform businesses, I am eager to deepen my knowledge and skills in this field. Coming from a background where educational and economic opportunities are often limited, I understand the importance of continuous learning and professional development. This certification would be a significant step in enhancing my qualifications and increasing my prospects for a successful career in software engineering.

I am excited about the possibility of obtaining a free certification attempt, as it would greatly assist me in becoming more proficient and competitive in the job market. I am deeply grateful for your consideration of my application.

Thank you for your time and support.

Best regards,
Thien

entry.title: MDG DQM derivation for BP role
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to derive BP role FLCU00 based on BP grouping field using DQM, but it's not working.

My Condition table has the field BP Grouping and decision table has the fields - BP Grouping (BU_GROUP) and BP role (RELTYP). The workflow decision table is configured correctly and the DQM service is also active.

Can someone please guide me how to achieve the BP role derivation using DQM. May be some inputs of condition table and result table would help.

entry.title: Re: How to apply metadata patch in SAP Service and Asset Manager
entry.content: Thank you Arun for such a detailed article.. It is very informative and helpful

entry.title: How to transport 'Draft' status of Financial Statement Versions in 3SL?
entry.content:
I have deactivated an FSV in Customizing tenant; hence the status is now 'Draft', but after transporting to Q/P, the status in those systems is still 'Active'.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to transport 'Draft' status of Financial Statemen...
entry.content: Please note it's not possible to have a 'Draft' status for FSV's in Q or P systems for 3SL landscapes. To remove the FSV, it needs to be deleted in customizing and then transported.

entry.title: SAP Commerce Cloud and Solr Upgrade
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I’ve noticed a warning in the SAP Commerce Cloud Portal that says: "To minimize the impact on your operations, update your Commerce solution to the latest available version. For more information, see the Supported Releases page and Update Releases page. To ensure compatibility with the composable storefront libraries, see the Composable Storefront Compatibility Matrix page.".

Our current SAP Commerce Cloud version is 2211.20, and we're using Solr 8.x. We came across an article on SAP Help that mentions that the 2211.20 version will be valid until September 10, 2024.

We have a few questions:

  1. If we don't upgrade Solr and SAP Commerce Cloud patch version to 2211.27, will it affect our build and deploy process?
  2. How much time do we have to complete these upgrades?

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud and Solr Upgrade
entry.content:
Hello there!

Indeed the SAP Commerce Cloud 2211.20 will be available only until the date you mentioned as per Update Releases - Update Releases Timeline. After that date all builds created with this version will fail with the exception described in the KBA 3242156 - Build not possible for EOMM versions of SAP Commerce Cloud, but deployments with already created builds will still be available. You can find this and more information also in Using an EOMM Version. 

Regarding the Solr 8.x version, it will still be compatible until the patch 25 of SAP Commerce Cloud 2211, but we keep the suggestion of always upgrading to the latest release available, which today is the patch 27. This means that you will need to also upgrade your Solr version to 9.x as it is the only compatible version with SAP Commerce Cloud 2211.27.

You have until the date of End Of Mainstream Maintenance (for the 2211.20 version is September 10, 2024) to upgrade to a higher version. If you wish, you can upgrade to SAP Commerce Cloud 2211.25 so you have time to prepare the Solr upgrade to 9.x as it is also compatible with the 8.x, but don't forget its EOMM date: January 21, 2025! 

Kind Regards,
Wesley

entry.title: Re: Download BTP Role Collection and Mapping Role collection to Roles
entry.content: Thanks Vini. The list command displays the output in CLI, is there any way to export and import users using command?

entry.title: Re: can we only use windows server 2019 for SAP Business One 10 and HANA DB without having any linux
entry.content: The whole system is installed on SUSE Linux, however, you need a windows environment to run the SAP Business One client.

entry.title: Re: SAP Installation Server and Microsoft Global Secure Access
entry.content:
Well finally, we managed to complete the task and update the machine over the Internet using Global Secure Access. We had to enable anonymous access on the share following the Domain file share with anonymous access - Microsoft Q&A. 

We edited the group policy for SAP Installation Server and apart from the group policy setting the following configurations:

  • "Accounts: Guest account status" – Enabled.
  • "Network Access: Let Everyone permissions apply to anonymous users" - Enabled

You have to set:

  • "Network access: Do not allow anonymous enumeration of SAM accounts and shares" - Disabled
  • "Network access: Shares that can be accessed anonymous." - Specify the shared folde names of SAP installation server

In this manner and after applying the GPO and restarting SAP Installation Server (these settings tweak HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE), I restarted the AWUS service and after authenticating on Global Secure Access, SAP upgraded the installation package to the latest version.

entry.title: List of POD Plugin Events for SAP Digital Manufacturing custom development
entry.content:
Q1: Where do I find a list of all POD Plugin Events I can use for SAP Digital Manufacturing custom development? 

Q2: Are there any events that are not listed in the POD Plugin Developer's Guide on the Help Portal?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: List of POD Plugin Events for SAP Digital Manufacturi...
entry.content:
Q1: Where do I find a list of all POD Plugin Events I can use for SAP Digital Manufacturing custom development? 

A1: The Plugin Events available for SAP Digital Manufacturing (SAP DM) are detailed in the POD Plugin Developer's Guide, accessible on the Help Portal. Additionally, examples of event usage and guidance on creating custom events can be found in the SAP GitHub repository referenced in section 4 of the guide.

Q2: Are there any events that are not listed in the POD Plugin Developer's Guide on the Help Portal?

A2: No, all available events are listed on the SAP Help Portal. The event presented in Section 4 of the GitHub repository is a custom event created as an example for reference. You can create your own events and subscribe to them in various POD plugins.

entry.title: Restricting EWM Inspection lot - The usage of Badi /SCWM/EX_QM_INSP_RELEVANCE
entry.content:
Requirement: System should not generate EWM Quality inspection lot when Vendor is sending same Supplier /SAP batch. If the supplier or SAP batch has ever been inspected, EWM should skip generating inspection lot and post GR into unrestricted stock type.

Problem Addressed/ Standard Scenario: There is no SAP standard functionality which allows to skip inspection lot creation based on above scenario when its product having Supplier/ SAP batch already undergone Usage decision. Standard SAP keeps generating inspection lot or add into common inspection lot using ' Inspection Lot Summary. But there is no workaround in standard to avoid generating 'Inspection Lot' if SAP/Supplier batch is already inspected.

Process: During receiving against Purchase Order either from Fiori or RFUI, system created inspection lot for inspection type '01' for corresponding Supplier/SAP batch. Latter, result recording and Usage decision is conducted for the required supplier/ SAP batch with acceptance or rejection. 

Solution: Since there is no standard functionality available to address the above requirement, SAP has provided Badi /SCWM/EX_QM_INSP_RELEVANCE  which can be used to prevent inspection lot creation according to the business requirement.( e.g. for a Product and its batch is already inspection) .This BAdI is available for both decentralized and embedded landscape. 

During first time SAP batch receiving 0000000140, system creating corresponding QI inspection with Q4 stock type. 

In same vendor lot/ SAP batch of the required product is received again. standard SAP would either create a new inspection lot or with inspection lot summary it will club this batch into already created inspection lot( Not inspected) using 'Inspection Lot Summary' as below

 

 Badi Implementation: Using SAP Badi /SCWM/EX_QM_INSP_RELEVANCE, it is possible to add a logic of stopping generation of inspection lot if Supplier/SAP batch has already been inspection. 

We build a logic reading QALS table if Product/Batch is already inspected in any of the plants, avoid creation of inspection lot generation using changing parameter of Badi.

In IS_QINSP_DATA importing parameter in Badi, customer can read many fields & can build their logic on custom requirement( E.g Avoid creation of inspection of certain document type or item type ) using CV_NOT_RELEVANT as influencing paramter.

Post Badi Implementation: Post Badi implementation, system allowed to skip inspection lot creation for Same Vendor/SAP batch combination in below example.

In below example, a shipment is received already received and inspected having Supplier Batch VEND006/ SAP batch 0000000140.

UD is completed.

In QALS table, inspection is marked with UD.

Receiving the same Vendor/ SAP batch combination, badi allowed to skip inspection lot creation.

On top of that, customer has to implement SAP note:3200795 - Stock type remains in quality when inspection is set to not relevant via BAdI. Even if you implement the badi, system would skip the inspection lot creation, but the stock of inbound delivery items remains in remain 'Q4' stock type. The above note fixes the issue.

Thanks for reading. All test is performed in S/4 HANA 2022 Sandbox Embedded EWM system

The blog is Co-Authored by  @prem_swaroop   my colleague from SAP labs India.

entry.title: Re: How to apply metadata patch in SAP Service and Asset Manager
entry.content: Nice one Arun... keep them coming!

I am getting error while executing same steps.

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content:
Hi @gerd_schoeffl 

Thank you for this useful feature ; we used to use the custom widget. 

By the way, is it possible to make these 2 methods available again?

  • getTotalJobRowCount()
  • getJobFailedRowCount()

And the selected filename too?

We'd like to display the history of upload directly in the story.

Regards,

Ginot

entry.title: Re: Withholding Tax - Error -1 Items have not been activated due to inconsistent withholding Tax inf
entry.content:
Dear Aswathe,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud solution you can use the "Schedule Accounts Payable Jobs" app. It's similar to the RFWT0010 reporting.

Create a new job to fix the withholding tax inconsistences in app "Schedule Accounts Payable Jobs". When creating select the template as "Adjustment of Withholding Tax Information to Relevant Types". 

Best Regards,
Erick Goulardt
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Initial Configurations for ABAP in the Cloud - Cloud Foundry Environment
entry.content: Thanks for the detailed doc. For some reason, eclipse did not like me trying to create the ABAP Cloud project using the 'SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Environment'. Used the alternative to create a service key, download the key and uploaded into eclipse.

entry.title: Horizontal scroll in RAP
entry.content:
I created a new CDS view with a lot of columns, but the horizontal bar not appear.

My cds:

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Read-Only E2E": Data Model Flight'

define view entity YKENJI_INFORME_RECAUDO
  as select from bseg as BSEG
{
      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 10, label: 'CompCode'} ]
  key bseg.bukrs  as BUKRS,

      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 20, label: 'AccDoc.'} ]
  key bseg.belnr  as BELNR,

      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 30, label: 'Year'} ]
  key bseg.gjahr  as GJAHR,

      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 40, label: 'Item'} ]
  key bseg.buzei  as BUZEI,

      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 50, label: 'Currency'} ]
      bseg.rfccur as rfccur,

      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 60, label: 'Doc.TP'} ]
      bseg.bschl  as BSCHL,

      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'rfccur'
      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 70, label: 'Value'} ]
      bseg.wrbtr  as WRBTR,

      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 80, label: 'Customer'} ]
      bseg.kunnr  as kunnr,

      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 90, label: 'Comp'} ]
      bseg.augbl  as AUGBL,

      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 100, label: 'DtComp'} ]
      bseg.augdt  as augdt,

      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 110, label: 'Assign'} ]
      bseg.zuonr  as zuonr,
      
      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 120, label: 'Text'} ]
      bseg.sgtxt  as sgtxt,
      
      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 130, label: 'Ordem'} ]
      bseg.aufnr  as aufnr,

      @ui.lineItem: [ { position: 140, label: 'SO'} ]
      bseg.vbeln  as vbeln
}

 

I created service definition and service binding, and result when executed is a list without horizontal bar.

When i click in "Show Detail" button, the scroll not appear, the other fields appear below.

How can i set my CDS as a grid with horizontal bar?

entry.title: Re: RAP - Error on Projection View for child nodes
entry.content: Adding "root" keyword in both CDS View Entity and CDS Projection view worked for me.

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content:
@JefB 

We had similar issues of user having data in pivot format. What we did is prepare upload template where this pivot is converted to unloadable format by unpivoting the data using excel power query in sheet next to the data. Since power query is reusable and provides lot of data cleaning transformation, it has helped a lot in streamlining the upload process.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: OData and MDK: I can't access the value of a property of an entity related to $expand
entry.content:
Hello community, thank you very much for the help. I have an exposed odata v4 service which gives me two entities that are related. If I build the query correctly using expand I can get results like this:

The problem is that in my mobile application it is showing me the description of the "Audit" entity and not the description of the "TipoAuditoria" entity.

I set up the relationship like this. My detail view "Auditoria_Detail.page" is like this:

And in my edit view, we can see that the values ​​are taken as follows:

{Auditoria/DESCRIPCION}

{TipoAuditoria/DESCRIPCION}

At first glance everything seems to be fine, but when I enter my application I find the following:

It gives me the description for Audit. What am I doing wrong? In "Tipo de auditoría" it should say: "Auditoría Operativa"

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content:
@gerd_schoeffl , @JefB 

In my testing today I found out this file upload method is able to upload data to parent nodes also without any extra job settings. Its tricky now because sometimes users copy paste data from other excel to prepare the data and there is no way to reject parent node data by enabling any settings. Also the upload template should have a sample negative number else the measures get recognized as integer and would truncate decimals later. So consciously the measure column needs to be set as number. Once transported the upload job query when edited is not able to retrieve the original upload template used while setting up the query so the upload template used should be kept handy for any future edits to the job. 

Also I hope in future release the upload status message will show records loaded as this was very useful for users to validate the load. Now this information is available in model data management console which end users might now have access to.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Can I update info prices of PO in massive?
entry.content: I would like to know if there is the possibility of updating purchase prices massive. That is, our suppliers offer us a price list with all the materials we buy from them and these prices vary every 6 months. We have suppliers from whom we buy up to 150 materials per month and updating the purchasing information material by material has been very tedious.

entry.title: Familiarize with Revtrac fundamentals functions
entry.content:
This Article is aimed for beginners / learners associated with Revtrac tool.  Let us explore few fundamental functions.

Creating users in revtrac:

  • Login to solman/Revtrac installed system  via user id and password
  • Login to revtrac console ( tcode : /n/rsc/rt01). To avoid entering tcode every time , add this to your favorites)
  • In console – go to organization
  • Click edit and add a new entry
    •  

    •  

  • Value is, U=0, A=1, R = U and then email address in lowercase. (exception for PI U=2)
  • Save the entry and go back one screen and activate changes.

Adding peer review:  These requests come in form of snow request where the new or existing user needs to be a peer reviewer as well. This basically allows team members to approve their transports for code change/functionality change etc. This is a not requested frequently. 

  • In console – go to organization
    • Click each tab under users to reach organization structure
      • Edit à add an entry à add: team name (there are already populated and can also found in Snow ticket) , Position – Peer for peer review, userID, leave the standin box, Full name )
      • Save the change and go back one screen
      • Click on activate changes and update the snow ticket.
      •  
      • Approving RTR (Rev-Trac request) :   
        • You’re alerted with an email.  You can click the link in the email request or login to URL -> enter the rtr number

        https://hostname.xxxx.com/revtrac/SID/dashboards

        Steps:

        • Open the RTR# (by using one of the above)
        • Click on Migrate to prod tab à Click yes to subsequent pop up and post completed you will the task bar will move forward to in production tab. That means the approval is completed. Resultà for example : 2475 ( it is approved and ready for production move)

        •  

        • Exceptions: OOPS error: if there is a oops error, make sure you reach out to ops
        • Updating mass update to users.    After our change in domain, we have a requirement to change email addresses of all users. So here are the steps to convert them.

        • Yes, the email address needs to change in the user table in Rev-Trac…

          Yes, there is an easier way…!

        • First, back up the entire configuration like below:

        • Save the output to something like “SID-Config - 031523.dnl”. we are backing up the whole configuration in case anything goes wrong (so we have a backup of existing one)

          Then, do the following:

        • Then, look at the next two screenshots:

        • Select only the users and download to a file named something like “SID-Users - 021523.dnl

          Now edit the notefile and replace the domain using find and replace.

          Once done do the similar steps only for users and this time upload the file instead of download.

        • Thank you for taking time to go through this article.
